nasb.text: For the violence done to Lebanon will overwhelm you, And the devastation of its beasts by which you terrified them, Because of human bloodshed and violence done to the land, To the town and all its inhabitants.

esv.text: The violence done to Lebanon will overwhelm you, as will the destruction of the beasts that terrified them, for the blood of man and violence to the earth, to cities and all who dwell in them.

cnv.text: 因你向黎巴嫩使用暴力，殺滅驚嚇野獸；又殺人流血，向全地各城和其中所有居民施行暴力，就必受到報應。

ccb.text: 你们以暴虐对待黎巴嫩， 自己必被暴虐吞噬； 你们毁灭野兽， 自己必被恐怖笼罩。 因为你们杀人流血， 摧毁土地、城市和人民。
